text:
Hi -ports, Denis,

It seems the UID #70 has already been taken by the PostgreSQL port.  So
I need a different UID suggestion.

I've converted this port (ifmail-os) to the latest ports protocols.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
